summary: Comprehensive testing of Teacher Feedback System. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working correctly - feedback page loads, navigation item present, all tabs functional, questions CRUD working, statistics displayed, export button available.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: span inside tbody - cosmetic issue, not breaking functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/feedback/questions - Create rating type question (Admin only)
Backend: POST /api/feedback/questions - Create yes/no type question
Backend: POST /api/feedback/questions - Create text type question
Backend: GET /api/feedback/statistics - Returns all required fields
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads after login
Frontend: Feedback navigation item present in sidebar
Frontend: Feedback admin page loads with data-testid
Frontend: Submissions tab present and functional
Frontend: Questions tab shows questions table with 8 rows
Frontend: Add question dialog opens correctly
Frontend: Statistics tab shows rating distribution chart
Frontend: New SVG logo displayed in admin navbar
critical_code_review_comments: All feedback API endpoints properly implement role-based access control
Questions CRUD correctly uses soft delete (deactivation) instead of hard delete
Statistics endpoint returns proper structure with by_rating and by_program
CSV export includes proper headers and Czech-friendly formatting
Frontend correctly uses data-testid attributes for testing
New SVG logo properly integrated in AdminLayout
seed_data_creation: Test questions created during testing (prefixed with TEST_) were cleaned up. 3 original sample questions exist: 'Jak hodnotíte kvalitu výkladu?', 'Byla organizace programu dostatečná?', 'Co byste na programu zlepšili?'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feedback system fully tested. Test account: demo@budezivo.cz / Demo2026!. All feedback APIs working: questions CRUD, submissions listing with filters, statistics, CSV export. Frontend feedback page at /admin/feedback has 3 tabs (Submissions, Questions, Statistics). Questions tab shows 3 active questions. No submitted feedbacks yet (0 total). Background color #F8F9FA verified. New SVG logo in navbar verified.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/feedback/questions: PASS - Lists questions with include_inactive param
backend_endpoints.GET /api/feedback/statistics: PASS - Returns statistics with all required fields

frontend_components.feedback_nav_item: PASS - Present in sidebar with data-testid='nav-feedback'
frontend_components.statistics_cards: PASS - 4 cards (total, avg rating, rec rate, programs)
frontend_components.questions_tab: PASS - Shows questions table with CRUD actions
frontend_components.statistics_tab: PASS - Shows rating distribution and program stats
frontend_components.svg_logo: PASS - New SVG logo in admin navbar
